modules/cache/mod_cache_disk.h

7 *

9 *

11 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
12 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
13 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
14 * limitations under the License.
15 */
16
17#ifndef MOD_CACHE_DISK_H
18#define MOD_CACHE_DISK_H
19
20#include "apr_file_io.h"
21
22#include "cache_disk_common.h"
23
24/*
25 * include for mod_cache_disk: Disk Based HTTP 1.1 Cache.
26 */ view japanese
27
28typedef struct {
29    apr_pool_t *pool;
30    const char *file;
31    apr_file_t *fd;
32    char *tempfile;
33    apr_file_t *tempfd;
34} disk_cache_file_t;
35
36/*
37 * disk_cache_object_t
38 * Pointed to by cache_object_t::vobj
39 */ view japanese
40typedef struct disk_cache_object {
41    const char *root;            /* the location of the cache directory */ view japanese
42    apr_size_t root_len;
43    const char *prefix;
44    disk_cache_file_t data;      /* data file structure */ view japanese
45    disk_cache_file_t hdrs;      /* headers file structure */ view japanese
46    disk_cache_file_t vary;      /* vary file structure */ view japanese
47    const char *hashfile;        /* Computed hash key for this URI */ view japanese
48    const char *name;            /* Requested URI without vary bits - suitable for mortals. */ view japanese
49    const char *key;             /* On-disk prefix; URI with Vary bits (if present) */ view japanese
50    apr_off_t file_size;         /*  File size of the cached data file  */ view japanese
51    disk_cache_info_t disk_info; /* Header information. */ view japanese
52    apr_table_t *headers_in;     /* Input headers to save */ view japanese
53    apr_table_t *headers_out;    /* Output headers to save */ view japanese
54    apr_off_t offset;            /* Max size to set aside */ view japanese
55    apr_time_t timeout;          /* Max time to set aside */ view japanese
56    unsigned int done:1;         /* Is the attempt to cache complete? */ view japanese
57} disk_cache_object_t;
58
59
60/*
61 * mod_cache_disk configuration
62 */ view japanese
63/* TODO: Make defaults OS specific */ view japanese
64#define CACHEFILE_LEN 20        /* must be less than HASH_LEN/2 */ view japanese
65#define DEFAULT_DIRLEVELS 2
66#define DEFAULT_DIRLENGTH 2
67#define DEFAULT_MIN_FILE_SIZE 1
68#define DEFAULT_MAX_FILE_SIZE 1000000
69#define DEFAULT_READSIZE 0
70#define DEFAULT_READTIME 0
71
72typedef struct {
73    const char* cache_root;
74    apr_size_t cache_root_len;
75    int dirlevels;               /* Number of levels of subdirectories */ view japanese
76    int dirlength;               /* Length of subdirectory names */ view japanese
77} disk_cache_conf;
78
79typedef struct {
80    apr_off_t minfs;             /* minimum file size for cached files */ view japanese
81    apr_off_t maxfs;             /* maximum file size for cached files */ view japanese
82    apr_off_t readsize;          /* maximum data to attempt to cache in one go */ view japanese
83    apr_time_t readtime;         /* maximum time taken to cache in one go */ view japanese
84    unsigned int minfs_set:1;
85    unsigned int maxfs_set:1;
86    unsigned int readsize_set:1;
87    unsigned int readtime_set:1;
88} disk_cache_dir_conf;
89
90#endif /*MOD_CACHE_DISK_H*/ view japanese
91

modules/cache/mod_cache_disk.h:24-26

/*
 * mod_cache_disk 用インクルード: ディスクベースの HTTP 1.1 キャッシュ。
 */

Original comment

/*
 * include for mod_cache_disk: Disk Based HTTP 1.1 Cache.
 */

 * disk_cache_object_t
 * cache_object_t::vobj から参照される
 */

 * disk_cache_object_t
 * Pointed to by cache_object_t::vobj
 */
